title: Coal Furnace Recipe
description: Adds a new recipe for Furnaces, with a Piece of coal in the middle.
body:
Replaces the Furnace Recipe with a new one which uses one piece of Coal or Charcoal in the middle.

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/016b40e64acf5f6375fa826a1d52ae2c7aefc326.png)

inspired by an older version of [Raspberry flavoured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/raspberry-flavoured)
